feedback.rawContent: Storybook issue #32444: @storybook/addon-vitest v9 fails when Vitest browser mode is disabled and the environment is jsdom or happy-dom. The failure comes from code/addons/vitest/src/vitest-plugin/test-utils.ts importing `server` from `@vitest/browser/context` at module scope and immediately reading `server.commands`. In non-browser mode, `@vitest/browser/context` throws during import: "@vitest/browser/context can be imported only inside the Browser Mode." A correct fix must remove the top-level `import { server } from '@vitest/browser/context'` and remove the top-level `const { getInitialGlobals } = server.commands`. Access browser context lazily with a guarded dynamic import and fallback, similar to viewports.ts, while preserving getInitialGlobals behavior in browser mode. Keep the change scoped to `code/addons/vitest/src/vitest-plugin/test-utils.ts` and, if useful, a colocated test file under `code/addons/vitest/src/vitest-plugin/`. Do not modify example storybooks, HTML files, or unrelated packages.
feedback.summary: Allow addon-vitest test utilities to load outside Vitest browser mode

verificationCommands: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path='code/addons/vitest/src/vitest-plugin/test-utils.ts'; const s=fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8'); if (/^import\\s*\\{\\s*server\\s*\\}\\s*from ['\"]@vitest\\/browser\\/context['\"]/m.test(s)) throw new Error('still imports server from @vitest/browser/context at module scope'); if (/const\\s*\\{\\s*getInitialGlobals\\s*\\}\\s*=\\s*server\\.commands/.test(s)) throw new Error('still reads server.commands at module scope'); if (!s.includes(\"import('@vitest/browser/context')\")) throw new Error('missing guarded dynamic browser context import'); if (!/catch\\s*\\(/.test(s)) throw new Error('dynamic import needs a fallback catch for non-browser mode'); const ember='test-storybooks/ember-cli/app/index.html'; if (fs.existsSync(ember) && fs.readFileSync(ember,'utf8').includes('test-utils.test.ts')) throw new Error('unrelated ember example HTML was modified');"
